content_body: We had an amazing stay at Above the Timberline. Everything was perfect!  We have made memories we will cherish forever. As well, we learned some things that we would like to pass on...call it Advice from the Mountains ~   REACH new heights, RISE above it all, be UPLIFTING, Patience-patience-patience, There is beauty as far as the eye can see, ROCK ON!  2020 has been a challenging year...Thank GOD for friends, memories, and Above the Timberline! ~ The Spontaneous Ladies and Their Loves
title: Advice From the Mountains
